scripts.build: node scripts/shyfr-content.mjs build && node scripts/shyfr-content.mjs validate
scripts.lint: eslint api/shyfr-*.js shyfr/*.js scripts/*.mjs tests/*.mjs eslint.config.js
scripts.typecheck: node --check api/shyfr-api.js && node --check api/shyfr-core.js && node --check api/kobza-leaderboard-worker.js && node --check shyfr/shyfr.js && node --check telegram-mini-app.js
